mainEntity.name: What is the average settlement for mesothelioma from workplace asbestos in Holladay?
mainEntity.text: What is the average settlement for mesothelioma from workplace asbestos in Holladay?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah mesothelioma settlements average $1.2M-$2.5M via workers' comp or third-party, covering medical, lost income, pain/suffering over lifetime.

suggestedAnswer.text: Holladay pipefitters pursue comp PPI (up to 100%) plus latency extensions. Asbestos trusts add $100K+. Life care plans project $500K+ care. Attorney contingency 20-33%.

name: Mesothelioma Settlement Values in Holladay
description: Utah mesothelioma settlements average $1.2M-$2.5M via workers' comp or third-party, covering medical, lost income, pain/suffering over lifetime.
